question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"function send\\b|function json\\b|function render\\b|function sendFile\\b|function attachment\\b|function redirect\\b\" lib/response.js"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"function query\\b|function protocol\\b|function path\\b|function hostname\\b|function host\\b|function accepts\\b\" lib/request.js"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"function param\\b|this\\.router\\.param|function engine\\b|function set\\b|function all\\b|function route\\b|function use\\b\" lib/application.js"
graph.answer:
The public surface is thin; the real runtime path is:

`require('express')` -> `createApplication()` -> `app.init()` -> per-request `app.handle()` -> `router.handle()` -> `Route.prototype.dispatch()` -> response/request helpers.

**Flow**
- The package entrypoint is [index.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/index.js), which just re-exports [lib/express.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/express.js#L27).
- `createApplication()` in [lib/express.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/express.js#L36) builds the app function, mixes in the application methods, and creates per-app request/response prototypes.
- `app.init()` and `app.defaultConfiguration()` in [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L59) and [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L90) set defaults and lazily attach `this.router`.
- Incoming requests hit `app.handle()` in [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L152), which:
  - installs `finalhandler`
  - sets `X-Powered-By`
  - wires `req.res` / `res.req`
  - swaps in the app-specific prototypes
  - delegates to `this.router.handle(...)`
- The app-level API wrappers are in [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L190), [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L256), [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L351), [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L471), [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L494), [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L522), and [lib/application.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/application.js#L598).
- The actual middleware/route matching is in the vendored router package:
  - [node_modules/router/index.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/node_modules/router/index.js#L52) creates the router function and [node_modules/router/index.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/node_modules/router/index.js#L149) runs the main dispatch loop.
  - [node_modules/router/index.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/node_modules/router/index.js#L362) defines `use(...)`, and [node_modules/router/index.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/node_modules/router/index.js#L425) creates route objects.
  - [node_modules/router/lib/route.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/node_modules/router/lib/route.js#L41) holds route stacks, and [node_modules/router/lib/route.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/node_modules/router/lib/route.js#L98) dispatches route handlers.
- Request-time helpers live in [lib/request.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/request.js#L230), [lib/request.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/request.js#L297), [lib/request.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/request.js#L403), [lib/request.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/request.js#L418), and [lib/request.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/request.js#L444).
- Response-time helpers live in [lib/response.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/response.js#L126), [lib/response.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/response.js#L234), [lib/response.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/response.js#L373), [lib/response.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/response.js#L815), and [lib/response.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/lib/response.js#L897).

**Read Next**
- Public API contract: [test/exports.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/exports.js#L7)
- App bootstrap and defaults: [test/app.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.js#L7)
- Server entrypoint: [test/app.listen.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.listen.js#L6)
- Mounting/middleware behavior: [test/app.use.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.use.js#L21), [test/app.use.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.use.js#L125), [test/app.use.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.use.js#L258)
- Route builder behavior: [test/app.route.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.route.js#L6)
- Router internals: [test/Router.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/Router.js#L15), [test/Router.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/Router.js#L162), [test/Router.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/Router.js#L433), [test/Router.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/Router.js#L500)
- Route internals: [test/Route.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/Route.js#L47), [test/Route.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/Route.js#L170)
- Request prototype isolation: [test/app.request.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.request.js#L8)
- Response prototype isolation: [test/app.response.js](/C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/express/test/app.response.js#L8)
